north_star: Viggo can say only `go`; the agent resolves loose vs repo-local work, repairs the .go contract if needed, then autonomously works toward the defined goal until done, blocked, or budget-exhausted.
wedge: A repo-local autonomous workflow stack: .go holds vision, principles, hierarchy, tasks, evidence, decisions, and loop state; Hermes/Bertus uses it to run a Ralph/old-go-workflow-style build→verify→critic→repair→ship loop without Viggo spamming micro-commands.
target_user: Viggo and future autonomous agents continuing this project.
core_promise: One `go` can turn rough intent into a valid .go contract, split the goal into tasks, claim/execute/recheck/devil/repair/commit/finish each task, self-reflect, capture lessons, and report compactly.
non_goals: no random feature invention from autonomy
no broad scope expansion without explicit goal fit
no command-spam handoff back to Viggo
success_metrics: a bare `go` routes correctly between loose work and repo-local .go work
valid .go contract is repaired before execution
open work is split into executable tasks with acceptance and verification
loop continues across tasks without Viggo re-triggering each phase
recheck/devil/self-reflect findings create repairs or follow-up tasks before final done
final report includes commits, verification, and open/blocker state
